allow: PowerShell($response = $null; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing } catch { $_.Exception.Response } ; if \($response\) { $response.StatusCode } else { "Error" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "error|Error|404|not found" -SimpleMatch | Select-Object -First 5 } catch { $_.Exception.Message; try { $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\) | ForEach-Object { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } | Select-String -Pattern "error|Error|layout|not.found" -SimpleMatch } catch { "Could not read response body" } })

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; try { $content = $wc.DownloadString\("http://localhost:3000/dashboard"\) } catch { $err = $_.Exception; if \($err.InnerException -and $err.InnerException.Response\) { $stream = $err.InnerException.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { $err.Message } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r1 = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; $r2 = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/parent/notices" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; "dashboard: $r1, parent/notices: $r2")
